name: Cloud File Sharing Policy Violation
description: Responds to cloud file sharing policy violations detected by DLP or CASB systems. Riggs AI analyzes the shared resource to determine data sensitivity and whether the sharing target is authorized. Confirmed violations trigger immediate link revocation, user notification with policy guidance, and SOC documentation. Supports SharePoint, OneDrive, Google Drive, and Box sharing alerts.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Revoke sharing links and modify file permissions on OneDrive/SharePoint

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify user of policy violation and provide remediation guidance

data.title: Cloud Sharing Violation Alert
data.summary: Triggers on cloud file sharing policy violations from DLP or CASB

data.title: AI Data Sensitivity Assessment
data.summary: Riggs AI assesses the shared file's data sensitivity and sharing risk

config.custom_instructions: Evaluate the shared file for sensitive content. Determine if the sharing target (external domain, public link) violates data handling policy. Assess intent — accidental oversharing vs deliberate.

data.title: Policy Violation Confirmed?
data.summary: Branch based on whether the sharing violates data protection policy

data.title: Revoke Sharing Link
data.summary: Immediately revoke the public or external sharing link

params.reason: Cloud sharing policy violation — sensitive data shared externally

data.title: Notify User — Policy Guidance
data.summary: Inform the user their sharing link was revoked with policy guidance

data.title: Update Status: Remediated
data.summary: Mark the alert as remediated after link revocation and user notification

config.note: Cloud sharing violation remediated. Sharing link revoked and user notified with policy guidance. File: {{$.trigger.alert.resource_name}}, Classification: {{$.nodes.csv-2.result.data_classification}}.

data.title: Close Alert — Within Policy
data.summary: Sharing is within policy guidelines, close alert

config.note: Cloud sharing alert reviewed by Riggs AI. The shared resource does not contain sensitive data or sharing is within approved policy boundaries. Closing alert.

data.title: Playbook Complete
data.summary: Cloud sharing violation response workflow finished

config.summary: Cloud file sharing policy violation response completed
